name: both composite-engine ADRs carry a Build status (fully implemented) section
command: grep -q '^## Build status' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/0008-composite-engine-and-4-axis-canonical-vocabulary.md" && grep -q '^## Build status' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/0009-auto-classification-and-rule-drafting-pipeline.md" && echo build-status-both 1>&2
